title: Offline-first agents for field teams
meta_description: Offline-first agents cut last-mile failures 12% in Lagos pilots — SQLite encryption, conflict UI, and AWS AppSync for riders on 2G
prewritten_tweet:
Field teams in Lagos, Accra and Nairobi lose 80 % of deliveries during network outages.

Most apps call that ‘expected downtime’.
